es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.net.tool

Class HTMLParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.net.tool.HTMLParser

  • public class HTMLParser
extends java.lang.Object
    Simple HTML parser.

      Keep only the content that is under the selected tag.

      Get the html document as a string.

      Return the document as an org.jsoup.nodes.Element instance.

      Recover the URL in the 'href' attribute, matching the passed text.
      java.lang.String getURLbyText(java.lang.String text, java.lang.String attribute)
      Recover the URL attribute matching the passed text.
      void removeLinks()
      Delete all the links (tag 'a') from the document.

      Injects the document element into the base document.

      Reset the content of the document.

      Reset the content of the document.

    • Method Detail

      • getURLbyText

        public java.lang.String getURLbyText(java.lang.String text)
                              throws java.lang.Exception
        Recover the URL in the 'href' attribute, matching the passed text.
        Parameters:
        text - where to search the URL.
        Returns:
        URL found.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception

      • getURLbyText

        public java.lang.String getURLbyText(java.lang.String text,
                                     java.lang.String attribute)
                              throws java.lang.Exception
        Recover the URL attribute matching the passed text.
        Parameters:
        text - where to search the URL.
        attribute - attribute that owns the URL ('href' in most of cases).
        Returns:
        URL found
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if text or @code attribute is null.
        java.lang.NoSuchFieldException
        java.lang.Exception

      • filterByTag

        public void filterByTag(java.lang.String tag)
                 throws java.lang.Exception
        Keep only the content that is under the selected tag.
        Parameters:
        tag - selected tag.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if text or @code attribute is null.
        java.lang.NoSuchFieldException
        java.lang.Exception

      • removeLinks

        public void removeLinks()
        Delete all the links (tag 'a') from the document.

      • setBaseDocument

        public void setBaseDocument(java.io.InputStream htmlBase,
                            java.lang.String charsetName,
                            java.lang.String baseUri)
                     throws java.lang.Exception
        Injects the document element into the base document.
        Parameters:
        htmlBase - base html document (it must have basic html structure (html/body).
        charsetName - charset to use, for example 'UTF-8'.
        baseUri - URI of the base document.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if htmlBase or @code baseUri is null.
        java.lang.Exception

      • getContent

        public java.lang.String getContent()
        Get the html document as a string.
        Returns:
        html content as a string.

      • setContent

        public void setContent(java.lang.String document)
        Reset the content of the document.
        Parameters:
        document - The HTML document to parse.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if document is null.

      • setContent

        public void setContent(java.io.InputStream is)
                throws java.io.IOException
        Reset the content of the document.
        Parameters:
        is -
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

        public org.jsoup.nodes.Element getDocument()
        Return the document as an org.jsoup.nodes.Element instance.
